idea-plugin.name: MdLens
idea-plugin.description:
MdLens is a read-only Markdown viewer for JetBrains IDEs.

It renders GitHub Flavored Markdown and Mermaid diagrams offline with GitHub Light and GitHub Dark themes that follow the IDE or stay independent.

  • GitHub Flavored Markdown and Mermaid diagrams
  • GitHub Light and GitHub Dark themes with optional IDE sync
  • Compact and Spacious profiles with configurable fonts, text scaling, content width, highlight colors, and live preview
  • Automatic refresh with relative images and links
  • Offline rendering with untrusted content sanitization

While enabled, MdLens opens supported Markdown and Mermaid files in its read-only viewer. AI and IDE tools can continue to modify the underlying files.

See the GitHub repository for implemented and planned features.
